rulings.Case Title: ESPERANZA LI VS. BRADEN MORE et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 23, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT BRADEN MORE's Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings DENIED as to the Third, Fourth, and Sixth Causes of Action. The Court finds sufficient facts pled to support the causes of action against More. (See Code Civ. Pro., § 438(b).) The Motion is GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND as to the First and Second Causes of Action since neither is a valid cause of action in California. (See Melchior v. New Line Productions, Inc. (2003) 106 Cal.App.4th 779, 793; Stansfield v. Starkey (1990) 220 Cal.App.3d 59, 76.). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: BARNABA BIENKOWSKI et al VS. LAWRENCE CHOY et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 23, 2015, line 2. DEFENDANT RICKY LAM's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Martin Murphys Notice And Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S February 3, 2015, Discovery Order
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 23, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANT MARTIN MURPHY's Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S February 3, 2015, Discovery Order OFF CALENDAR as duplicative. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOHN PAPPAGEORGE VS. MARTIN V MURPHY JR et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court'S February 3, 2015, Discovery Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration Of Jonathan Bornstein, In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 23, 2015, line 3. DEFENDANTs MARTIN MURPHY and NORA MURPHY's Motion For Reconsideration Of The Court's February 3, 2015, Discovery Order OFF CALENDAR as moot. The Court heard this motion on April 20, 2015. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VERONICA CHAVEZ VS. DANIEL VIELE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 23, 2015, line 4. DEFENDANT DANIEL VIELE's MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT CONTINUED to May 14, 2015. Moving party failed to provide the Court with a courtesy copy of the operative complaint. (See SF Local Rule 2.6C.) Courtesy copies must be dropped off in Dept. 501 by 4 p.m. on May 4, 2015 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: KELLY RAFFERTY ET AL VS. ALAN ABRUZZO ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 23, 2015, line 5. DEFENDANTs ALAN ABRUZZO, SARA CORBETT, TIYA-B NUCCI, LOFT AND GARDEN, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT SUSTAINED with leave to amend. No opposition filed. Plaintiffs failed to plead sufficient facts to state a cause of action. (Code Civ. Pro., § 430.10, subd. (e).) = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: VERA CORT VS. CARL HILSZ **CONVERTED FROM U/D TO LIMITED CIVIL ACTION PER COURT ORDER SEP-29-11**
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For A Monetary Sanction
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 23, 2015, line 6. PLAINTIFF VERA CORT's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery And For A Monetary Sanction DENIED. Plaintiff appears to have failed to comply with service of process. (See April 15, 2015 Order Shortening Time.) Even if properly served, Plaintiff failed to provide a meet and confer declaration in support of her motion that states facts showing a reasonable and good faith attempt at an informal resolution of the dispute. (Code Civ. Pro., § 2016.040.). = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: 1030-1042 POLK II, LLC VS. ALI GHALEB ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, April 23, 2015, line 7. DEFENDANT ALI GHALEB's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR as moot. Plaintiff filed a First Amended Complaint on April 21, 2015. = (501/REQ)
